description: Asset check that emits OpenLineage START/COMPLETE events to OL-compatible backends (Marquez, DataHub, OpenMetadata) when an upstream asset materializes.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Asset whose materialization triggers an OL event

auth_token_env.label: Auth Token Env
auth_token_env.description: Env var with bearer token (omit for unauthenticated)

producer_url.label: Producer Url
producer_url.description: `producer` URL field on the event (identifies the emitter)

job_name_override.label: Job Name Override
job_name_override.description: Override OL job name (default: derived from asset)

schema_facet.label: Schema Facet
schema_facet.description: Include the schema facet inferred from DataFrame columns

column_lineage_facet.label: Column Lineage Facet
column_lineage_facet.description: Optional column-lineage map: {output_col: [input_col, ...]} → emitted as the columnLineage facet

upstream_input_assets.label: Upstream Input Assets
upstream_input_assets.description: Asset keys to declare as `inputs` on the OL job (None = no inputs declared)
